message:
feat(search,ui): delegate RRF fusion to frankensearch-fusion and change per_pane_limit default to unlimited

Search fusion refactor:
- Replace the hand-rolled RRF (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) implementation in
  query.rs with a call to frankensearch-fusion's `rrf_fuse()`.  This
  consolidates the ranking algorithm into the shared frankensearch crate,
  ensuring cass and other consumers use identical fusion logic.
- Add `frankensearch-core` and `frankensearch-fusion` as new path
  dependencies; enable `crossterm-compat` feature on ftui-runtime.
- Introduce `search_hit_doc_id()` / `search_hit_key_doc_id()` helpers
  that produce deterministic doc-id strings (using Unit Separator 0x1F)
  for bridging cass SearchHit keys to frankensearch's doc_id strings.
- Convert lexical hits into `FsScoredResult` and semantic hits into
  `FsVectorHit` before passing to `fs_rrf_fuse()`.
- Content-level deduplication and tool-noise filtering are preserved in
  the cass layer after fusion, maintaining existing result quality.
- The former HybridScore/FusedHit structs and cmp_fused_hit_desc
  comparator are now #[cfg(test)] only, since production code no longer
  uses them (kept for test assertions).
- Remove the now-unused RRF_K constant (the default lives inside
  frankensearch-fusion's RrfConfig).

Per-pane limit change:
- Change per_pane_limit default from 10 to 0 (meaning unlimited).
  This shows all results in each agent pane instead of truncating.
- Update PaneGrew/PaneShrunk handlers: PaneGrew adds 10 (no-op when
  unlimited), PaneShrunk transitions from unlimited to 50 on first
  shrink, then decreases by 10 with a floor of 1.
- Remove the .clamp(4, 50) restriction on persisted per_pane_limit
  deserialization to allow the 0 (unlimited) value to round-trip.
- Update all affected test assertions to use per_pane_limit=0.
- Minor formatting fix in detail_find assertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
